body_txt:
So you're watching your favorite TV show, nothing seems unusual until a very familiar name is dropped.
Bob McGee , from The Bob and Alice Adventures movie franchise? What's he doing in this random rom-com? Character overlap is when a character in one series makes regular Crossover appearances in another series. This is a casual way to tie these two shows together, and a technique used to help define a 'Verse . While this is usually in the form of major characters in one work appearing as supporting cast in another, the overlapping characters can have varying levels of narrative significance in either one. Compare with Transplant , where a character permanently migrates to another work, and Company Cross-References , which encompasses other non-character references as well. See also Canon Welding . Not related to Significant Name Overlap .
